video_details.title: How to Use Fibonacci Levels Like a Wall Street Pro
video_details.description:
Most traders are using Fibonacci Trading indicator wrong versus how pro traders use Fib levels. Fibonacci retracements are one of the most popular trading indicators, and after looking at thousands of charts and backtesting, I learned how Fibonacci Retracement and Fibonacci Extensions work and whether or not they actually help traders. This video is probably not what you thought I was going to say, but it's important for me to cover why I don’t think Fibonacci's work, and the one use case where I think they can actually help with trading.

✅ Join my trading course ➡️: https://theonelanceb.com/

With over $100m in verified profits, I now spend my time focused on turning good traders into greats and greats into GOATs. Advisor to SMB Capital and mentor of 7- and 8-figure PER YEAR traders.
